answer: Florida purchase closings for FNF National Title were overstated in escrow disbursement reconciliation because `settlement_disbursement_recon_v3` joined `party_identity_bridge` on `normalized_tax_id` instead of `closing_party_role_id`. `normalized_tax_id` was reused across buyer and seller roles in the same closing, which duplicated rows into `finance.disbursement_recon_daily`. The fix is to rebuild the daily reconciliation view from the correct closing-role key and backfill the affected Florida purchase closings.

facts.affected_segment: florida purchase closings for fnf national title
facts.remediation: rebuild finance.disbursement_recon_daily using closing_party_role_id and backfill florida purchase closings
